description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine designed for dispensing cold drinks. The front panel features a large, vibrant blue graphic with water droplets and the bold text 'COLD drinks' in white, giving it a refreshing and inviting appearance. On the right side of the front panel, there is a vertical column containing a display panel, payment interface, and a set of product selection buttons, each labeled with different drink options. Below these controls, a rectangular product retrieval slot is visible for collecting purchased beverages. The sides and back of the machine are solid black, with the back featuring a small ventilation grille near the bottom. The overall construction appears robust, with a hard, glossy exterior likely made of metal and plastic.
description: A tall, rectangular vending machine with a blue 'COLD drinks' graphic, black sides, and a control panel with buttons and a retrieval slot on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue 'COLD drinks' graphic, control panel with display, payment interface, selection buttons, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left-side view showing the blue graphic wrapping around the side, with no visible controls or slots.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black surface with a small ventilation grille at the bottom left.
description_view_3: Right-side view with the blue 'COLD drinks' graphic, no visible controls or slots.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular display panel is located on the upper right section of the front, above the selection buttons, showing digital or printed information.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present below the display panel, featuring slots for coins and bills, and possibly a card reader.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Six rectangular, vertically arranged buttons are present on the right side of the front panel, each labeled with a different drink option.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal rectangular slot is located near the bottom center of the front panel, used for retrieving purchased drinks.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large 'COLD drinks' text in white is prominently displayed on the blue front panel, with water droplet graphics for visual branding.
